title: Trail Menorca Camí de Cavalls 2026
location: Camí de Cavalls, vuelta a la isla
description: The 2026 edition of the staged trail-running race along the historic Camí de Cavalls, with distances of 11, 27, 44, 58, 85, 100 km and the legendary 185 km loop of the island. It is held from 30 April to 3 May 2026.
